transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Did you talk to Professor Allen about your research proposal?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Not yet. I'll stop by during his office hours this afternoon.

questions.prompt: What will the man probably do?

choices.text: Meet with Professor Allen this afternoon.
Attend a lecture by Professor Allen.

questions.evidence: I'll stop by during his office hours this afternoon.
